tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a live website (by URL) or of inline HTML and return it as an image. Provide exactly one of `url` or `html`. Supports full-page capture, PNG/JPEG/WebP output, a custom viewport, and capturing a single element by CSS selector. Requires an API key (Authorization: Bearer) — get

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Extract the readable content of a live web page (by `url`) or inline `html` as clean Markdown or plain text — navigation, ads and page chrome stripped (Mozilla Readability). Ideal for feeding a page into an LLM prompt or a RAG pipeline: it renders the page in a real browser first, so JavaScript/SPA

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "take_screenshot" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
